# Flow: Shopping

Plan → shop trip → checkoff → pantry replenishment

## Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Plan[/inkop plan]
  Shop[/inkop shop]
  Checkoff[Pick item]
  Pantry[shopping-to-pantry]
  Plan --> Shop
  Shop --> Checkoff
  Checkoff --> Pantry
```

## Steps

| # | Step | Route | Screenshot | Source |
|---|------|-------|------------|--------|
| 1 | Shopping plan | `/inkop` | [shopping-plan](../SCREENSHOTS/shopping-plan.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/ShoppingV2PlanView.svelte` |
| 2 | Start shop trip | `/inkop` | [shopping-trip](../SCREENSHOTS/shopping-trip.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/ShoppingV2ShopView.svelte` |
| 3 | Checklist drawer (legacy grid) | `/inkop` | — | `src/lib/components/organisms/ShoppingChecklistDataGrid.svelte` |
| 4 | Trip complete | `/inkop` | [success-states](../SCREENSHOTS/success-states.png) | `src/lib/components/organisms/ShoppingV2Page.svelte` |
| 5 | Empty shopping list | `/inkop` | [empty-shopping](../SCREENSHOTS/empty-shopping.png) | `src/lib/components/molecules/EmptyState.svelte` |
